tools.name: get_occurrences
tools.description: Returns occurrences of a specific object within a time range and variant filter. Use when you need to find where/when an object appears.

object.description: Name of the object to search for.

from.description: Start date/time of the range (ISO format recommended).

to.description: End date/time of the range (ISO format recommended).

outputSchema.description: List of occurrences and their metadata.

tools.name: get_count
tools.description: Returns total count of occurrences for a given object, variant and time range. Use when you only need aggregated counts.

object.description: Name of the object to count.

from.description: Start date/time of the range (ISO format recommended).

to.description: End date/time of the range (ISO format recommended).

outputSchema.description: Contains total count value and list of occurrencies.

tools.name: get_most_frequent
tools.description: Returns the most frequently occurring objects in a given time range. Use when ranking or top-N analysis is needed.

object.description: Name of the object to count.

from.description: Start date/time of the range (ISO format recommended).

to.description: End date/time of the range (ISO format recommended).

outputSchema.description: List of most frequent objects with counts.
